title: AlphaDynamics: Compact Phase-Oscillator Neural Propagator for Protein Torsion Dynamics with Backbone 3D Reconstruction
description: AlphaDynamics v0.4.0 — Python package for predicting protein backbone torsion dynamics from sequence using a compact (78K params) phase-oscillator neural propagator. Achieves 2.39x lower mean Ramachandran JSD than Microsoft Timewarp 4AA model with 9,652x fewer parameters. New in v0.4.0: deterministic backbone 3D reconstruction from torsion trajectories using NeRF (Parsons 2005) with Engh-Huber 1991 standard bond geometry. Provides multi-model PDB output for visualization in PyMOL/VMD/ChimeraX, plus per-frame radius of gyration and end-to-end distance diagnostics. Scope note: best-validated for short peptides (4-15 aa); sequences longer than 20 aa are outside the calibrated scope.
